chunks.title: Oracle Against the Ruler of Tyre
chunks.reason: A direct prophetic speech addressing the human ruler of Tyre regarding his pride and impending judgment.

chunks.title: Lamentation Over the King of Tyre
chunks.reason: A poetic lament describing the king's origin in Eden and fall due to pride, likely targeting a cosmic or royal figure.

chunks.title: Judgment on Sidon and Restoration of Israel
chunks.reason: A prophetic oracle against Sidon followed by a promise of restoration for the house of Israel.
